notes: Switzerland have a clean bill of health and are near full-strength, with Yakin only considering minor attacking rotation (Manzambi potentially in for Vargas/Okafor). Bosnia-Herzegovina are hit by multiple injury concerns: Nidal Celik is ruled out of the entire tournament (replaced by Arjan Malic), captain Edin Dzeko missed the opener with a shoulder injury and remains doubtful, Haris Tabakovic is also ruled out, and Sead Kolasinac faces a late fitness test after limping off against Canada.
home_scorers: Breel Embolo (leading striker, scored penalty vs Qatar, set to start)
Granit Xhaka (set-piece threat, midfield engine, high-volume shooter)
Dan Ndoye (dynamic wide attacker, direct runner into box)
away_scorers: Ermedin Demirovic (co-striker, key attacking outlet with Dzeko absent/doubtful)
Jovo Lukic (scored opener vs Canada, partner striker, aerial threat)
Esmir Bajraktarevic (creative wide midfielder, direct, scored World Cup penalty
